statement.informal: Universality of EML: every EML-elementary function is computed by some EML routing tree. The `IsEMLElementary` predicate guarantees a tree witness exists; this theorem extracts it. (with ceml replaced by eal)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem eml_universality :
    ∀ f : ℂ → ℂ, IsEMLElementary f → ∃ t : EMLTree, ∀ x, f x = t.eval x

tactics:
theorem eml_universality :
    ∀ f : ℂ → ℂ, IsEMLElementary f → ∃ t : EMLTree, ∀ x, f x = t.eval x := by
  intro f hf
  obtain ⟨_, t, _hd, ht⟩ := hf
  exact ⟨t, ht⟩

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
